home.about_quote: Architecture should speak of its time and place, but yearn for timelessness.
home.about_body: We are a team led by Niloufar Zanjani — architect and interior designer with over 13 years of professional experience across residential and commercial projects. Our approach bridges modern art and engineering precision, creating spaces that are as functional as they are beautiful.
home.marquee_text: Architecture · Interior Design · Muscat · Oman · NILZ ·

about.hero_title:
Designing with purpose.
Building with integrity.
about.bio_1: I am Niloufar Zanjani, architect and interior designer with over 13 years of professional experience across residential and commercial projects. My approach bridges modern art and engineering precision — creating spaces that are as functional as they are beautiful.
about.bio_2: After a decade of design, construction supervision and project management, and three years of freelance practice in Oman, I now lead NILZ Architecture & Interior Design Group in Al Mouj, Muscat — and hold membership in the Oman Society of Engineers.
about.bio_3: At NILZ, we believe quality of life is rooted in the spaces we inhabit. We are committed to turning your vision into an enduring reality — through authentic materials, meticulous detail, and the latest in architectural knowledge.

values.title: Contextual Design
values.body: We design with the surroundings in mind — creating spaces that feel rooted in place, culture, and natural light.

values.title: Timeless Aesthetics
values.body: Every detail is carefully considered to ensure longevity, elegance, and a visual language that transcends trends.

values.title: Functional Flow
values.body: From layout to circulation, we prioritise clarity and ease of use — shaping environments that support daily life intuitively.

values.title: Collaborative Process
values.body: We work closely with clients, engineers, and builders — ensuring every decision is aligned with the shared vision.

services.hero_title: Architecture shaped by vision and detail.
services.intro: We deliver thoughtful architectural solutions that solve complex challenges with clarity, creativity, and precision.

items.title: Vision & Scope
items.body: Every project begins with a conversation. We take time to understand how you live and work, your aspirations, and the realities of the site — then translate them into a clear brief and a defined scope. This shared understanding becomes the compass that guides every decision that follows, from the first sketch to the final detail.

items.title: Planning
items.body: Before a single form is drawn, we study the site in depth — its orientation, light, climate, views, and surrounding context, alongside the regulations that shape what's possible. From this analysis we develop a spatial strategy and concept direction that feels grounded and almost inevitable, carefully balancing how a space performs with how it should feel to live in.

items.title: Designing
items.body: This is where ideas take shape. We develop the architecture and interiors together — massing, layouts, materials, light, and detailing — refining each through drawings and 3D visualization until the design is both bold and timeless. Every proportion, surface, and junction is considered so the finished space feels effortless, purposeful, and unmistakably yours.

items.title: Final Step
items.body: We translate the design into precise technical drawings, schedules, and documentation, coordinating closely with engineers and consultants so every detail is feasible and buildable. Through construction we stay involved — supervising quality, resolving details on site, and managing finishes — so the project is delivered exactly as envisioned, down to the last detail.

process.title: Vision & Scope
process.body: Every project begins with dialogue. We listen, define the brief, and understand the vision — setting the direction for everything that follows.

process.title: Planning
process.body: We study the location, light, landscape and context to create a concept that feels grounded and natural — both functionally and emotionally.

process.title: Designing
process.body: From massing to materials, we shape bold yet timeless spaces that balance aesthetics, purpose, and experience.

process.title: Final Step
process.body: Our team prepares precise drawings and documentation — collaborating with engineers and consultants to ensure feasibility and performance.

contact.hero_sub: Whether you're starting a project or just exploring ideas, we'd love to hear from you.
